verification.notes: Official page verifies map identity, key landmarks, and Secret Room as a major feature; exact room spots still require manual in-game verification.

route: leave front road after first fight

locations.description: Compact high-tier compound with immediate fights.

locations.description: Theme park area with many small buildings and flank routes.

locations.name: Cement Factory

secret_rooms.name: Vikendi Security Room
locations: Northwest of Observatory, near the west mountain road
Northeast of Observatory / west of Cosmodrome, beside the bear cave cluster
East of Cosmodrome, north of the Laveni road
Between Naros and Train Station, in the central hills
North of Castle, south of Train Station
Northwest of Winery / west of Deka Mesto
South of Deka Mesto / north of Winery, beside the cave cluster
Southeast of Castle, west of Kranik, beside the cave cluster
secret_rooms.loot: High-tier Vikendi Secret Room loot. Update 40.2 lists Jammer Pack, Emergency Pickup, Folded Shield, Mountain Bike, Mortar, All-In-One Repair Kit, Stun Gun, Zipline Gun, and Emergency Cover Flare as added Secret Room spawn items.
secret_rooms.notes: Bunker markers transcribed from community images and corroborated by the newer Steam guide. Exact doors should still be checked in PC live or PUBG Bridge.

verification.patch: Steam guide May 2026 plus official Update 21.2/40.2
verification.notes: Existence and Security Key requirement are official. Steam guide says locations were manually verified in Aug-Oct 2025.

secret_rooms.name: Vikendi Bear Caves
locations: North of Train Station / west of Laveni
Southeast of Castle / west of Kranik
secret_rooms.requirements: No key card requirement. Expect bears and cave entry risk.
secret_rooms.loot: Cave loot and tactical cover; verify exact current loot tables in PC live.
secret_rooms.notes: Green cave markers transcribed from the supplied Vikendi image.

verification.notes: Useful callouts from user-provided community image; exact cave entrances still need live verification.
